title: AI Video Generation Request Flow
boot_flow: registerProviders() → creates OpenAIVideoGenerationProvider, TogetherVideoGenerationProvider, GeminiVideoGenerationProvider (if API keys configured)
for each provider: provider.models() → builds #modelIdMap with id/puterId/alias resolution + cost-based sorting
generate_flow: DriverService._call() → _process_args('puter-video-generation', 'generate', args) [validates via registry interface definition]
DriverService emits 'driver.create-call-context' with Context sub { client_driver_call, call_details }
DriverService.call_new_({ actor, service: AIVideoGenerationService, iface, method, args })
call_new_ → Invoker decorator: rate-limit check (svc_rateLimit.check_and_increment) under policy_holder
AIVideoGenerationService.generate() → resolves intendedProvider from params.provider or legacyProviderName or DEFAULT_PROVIDER ('openai-video-generation')
AIVideoGenerationService.generate() → getModel({ modelId: parameters.model, provider: intendedProvider }) → looks up #modelIdMap
AIVideoGenerationService.generate() → provider.generate({ ...parameters, model: model.id, provider: model.provider, test_mode })
call_new_ → Invoker decorator: result coercion (TypedValue → desired interface result type via svc_coercion)
call_new_ → returns { success: true, service: { name: 'ai-video' }, result }
DriverService._call() → attaches response_metadata → returns to Client
list_flow: Same DriverService routing as generate → AIVideoGenerationService.list()
AIVideoGenerationService.list() → models() → iterates #modelIdMap, deduplicates by provider:puterId/id, sorts by provider+id
Returns sorted array of model puterId or id strings
key_relationships: AIVideoGenerationService composes IVideoProvider instances: OpenAIVideoGenerationProvider, TogetherVideoGenerationProvider, GeminiVideoGenerationProvider
DriverService routes 'puter-video-generation' → 'ai-video' via hardcoded iface_to_driver map

AIVideoGenerationService.generate(parameters: IGenerateVideoParam: Main entry; resolves provider+model, validates params, delegates to provider.generate()
AIVideoGenerationService.list(): Returns sorted array of model IDs from #modelIdMap
AIVideoGenerationService.models(): Returns deduplicated, sorted IVideoModel[] from all providers
AIVideoGenerationService.getModel({ modelId, provider? }): Looks up IVideoModel from #modelIdMap; prefers exact id > puterId > first
AIVideoGenerationService.registerProviders(): Instantiates providers from config; emits extension hook event
AIVideoGenerationService.__on_boot.consolidation(): Calls registerProviders(), builds model id map, registers service aliases

DriverService.call(o): Public entry; delegates to _call, wraps errors
DriverService._call({ driver, iface, method, args }): Resolves driver alias, builds context, delegates to call_new_
DriverService.call_new_({ actor, service, iface, metho: Permission check, rate-limit via Invoker, calls service.as(iface)[method](args)
DriverService._process_args(iface, method, args): Validates and coerces args against interface registry definition
DriverService.register_service_alias(service_name, ali: Registers provider→service name mapping under optional iface scope
DriverService.get_service_or_throw_(name, iface): Resolves service by name+trait; falls back to driver registry

GeminiVideoGenerationProvider.generate(params: IGenerateVideoParams): Validates prompt, checks credits, calls Gemini API, polls, increments usage, returns TypedValue URL
GeminiVideoGenerationProvider.getDefaultModel(): Returns first model id from GEMINI_VIDEO_GENERATION_MODELS
GeminiVideoGenerationProvider.#pollUntilComplete(operation): Polls Gemini operation every 10s until done or 10min timeout

important_notes: test_mode: skips real API call, returns DEFAULT_TEST_VIDEO_URL; also skips usage metering (skip_usage=true)
Provider selection priority: params.provider > legacy intended_service > DEFAULT_PROVIDER > first configured
Model alias resolution: exact id > puterId > short-name (org/model → model) > first; sorted by cost ascending
Gemini polling: 10s interval, 10min timeout, proxied URLs with HMAC signature (48h expiry)
DriverService Invoker applies two decorators: rate-limit enforcement + result metadata wrapping
Extension providers registered via EventService 'ai.video.registerProviders' event at boot
